---
title: "Lựa chọn mô hình và lựa chọn biến"
author:
  - "Trần Việt Hà"
  - "Nguyễn Đình Mai Vi"
  - "Vũ Hà Thư"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d/%m/%Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: false
  html_document:
    toc: true
    df_print: paged
fontsize: 11pt
geometry: margin=2.5cm
mainfont: "Times New Roman"
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{amsmath}
  - \usepackage{amssymb}
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
editor_options: 
  markdown:   
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
```


```{r child="parts/DatVanDe.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/TieuChuanLuaChonBien.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/PhuongPhapLuaChonMoHinh&KiemChungCheo.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/DienGiaiMoHinhBangDatasetMau.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/Tailieuthamkhao.Rmd"}
```
